vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: Configuring chrony time sources is a standard operation with low risk. The server directive is the recommended way to specify NTP servers.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: networking affected; Incorrect time server configuration could impact time synchronization; Time sync issues could affect logging and certificate validation
